title: Provisional Accreditation of Principals/Employers. The Department
content: 36 may grant a one-time provisional accreditation for a non-extendible period of one hundred 37 and fifty (150) calendar days, pending the submission of a verified or authenticated or 38 attested MA and SPA. 39 40 It shall be the policy of the Department not to grant provisional accreditation to 41 principals/employers with enrolled fishing ships. 42 43
